blended.narrative: Wildcat Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 61°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
